provenance.notes: Top-level category scaffold. Character cats have community-curated definitions and exact community-curated membership/index numbers, but they are not official protocol traits.

genesis.label: Genesis Cats
genesis.notes: Genesis supply/generation are documented in data/special-cats.json and data/protocol-constants.json, but exact IDs are not materialized here yet.

characterCats.label: Character Cats
characterCats.notes: Community-curated narrative categories, not official protocol traits. Exact community-curated rescue-order index membership lives in data/character-cat-index.json; ids remain empty here to avoid duplicating large arrays.

specialCats.label: Special Cats
specialCats.notes: Genesis source facts are partially verified; other special categories remain placeholders.

todos: Confirm the index convention used by data/character-cat-index.json before downstream UI/tool use.
Keep aggregate IDs synchronized with category-specific data files.
Keep community-curated categories separate from official protocol traits.
